projects.name: GT Precision Website
bullets: Site owns #1-2 for 'precision sheet metal Tampa' and is named first in AI answers. GSC: 231 clicks / 25.8K impressions (3 mo). GBP 4.7 stars / 12 reviews, flat 30 days; photos stale.
Open for Greg: upload the 4 staged GBP photos, ask 2-3 customers for Google reviews (top lever), claim Apple Business Connect + Bing Places. FabBridge quote engine needs production wiring.
